scripts.full: tsx src/sample.ts --per-band ${PER_BAND:-30} --out data/players-blitz-full.json && tsx src/sample.ts --time-class rapid --per-band ${PER_BAND:-30} --out data/players-rapid-full.json && tsx src/calibrate.ts --games ${GAMES:-10} --in data/players-blitz-full.json --out data/metrics-v2.jsonl && tsx src/calibrate.ts --games ${GAMES:-10} --in data/players-rapid-full.json --out data/metrics-v2.jsonl && tsx src/build-baselines.ts --pilot false --in data/metrics-v2.jsonl
